title: SCP Fallen Foundation
description: An SCP mod that focuses on bringing popular and maybe obscure SCPs to Minecraft
body:
![SCP FF Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d89889a9b47998b8a9c614da2fadac15831860ff.png)


**SCP - Fallen Foundation** is a mod for 1.19.4 that focuses on adding popular and obscure SCPs to Minecraft. SCP: Fallen Foundation is being developed by 6 developers, the mod doesn't try to do anything unique, this is simply a passion project, there are plans to add way more SCPs, and even survival compatibility with LORE!!! We hope you enjoy this mod :)

- SCP-035 - The Possessive Mask - By Kain Pathos Crow - SCP-049 - Plague Doctor - By Gabriel Jade - SCP-058 - Heart of Darkness - By far2 - SCP-106 - The Old Man - By Dr Gears - SCP-109 - Infinite Canteen - By Kain Pathos Crow - SCP-131 - The "Eye Pods" - By Lt Masipag - SCP-173 - The Sculpture - By Lt Masipag - SCP-207 - Cola Bottles - By Aeish - SCP-268 - Cap Of Neglect - By Pair Of Ducks - SCP-330 - Take Only Two - By Dr Kondraki - SCP-500 - Panacea Pills - By far2 - SCP-650 - Startling Statue - By Dr Talson - SCP-939 - With Many Voices - By Adam Smascher - SCP-1023-ARC - A Telekill Sword - By DrClef - SCP-1025 - Encyclopedia Of Diseases - By Lasergoose - SCP-1507 - Pink Flamingos - By Rex Atlas - SCP-●●|●●●●●|●●|● - By LurkD



- YesMan2 - Owner, Modeler - Zeus - Lead Coder - Phoillows - Coder - Lucent - Builder SCP-096's sounds are from [SCP Secret Laboratory](https://store.steampowered.com/app/700330/SCP_Secret_Laboratory/) and SCP-049s sounds are from [SCP Containment Breach](https://www.scpcbgame.com)

Go check out some other SCP mods as well, like SCP: Lockdown and SCP: Overtime :)
